title: jacea phrygia subsp. elatior
intro: Jacea phrygia subsp. elatior, commonly known as Sium latifolium or Greater Burnet Saxifrage, is a perennial plant species in the family Apiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Jacea phrygia subsp. elatior include its ability to reduce fever, relieve digestive issues, and act as an antioxidant. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential interactions with other medications.
